meta.title: Marine Corps Boot Camp | Rappel Tower
meta.description:
Have a fear of heights? Recruits at Marine Corps boot camp will quickly overcome their fears during their rappel tower training. 

(U.S. Marine Corps video by Lance Cpl Randall D. Whiteman)
*No DoD endorsement implied.
